title: prunus × kalmykovii
intro: Prunus × kalmykovii, also known as the Kalmyk plum or Kalmyk apricot, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Prunus genus and is a cross between Prunus armeniaca and Prunus ussuriensis. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and inflammation. The bark of Prunus × kalmykovii contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for cardiovascular health, immune system function, and digestion. Herbal preparations of Prunus × kalmykovii bark can be consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures, but its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
